Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue To Orange County
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CALPORTLAND COMPANY Motion for Change of Venue from San Francisco Superior Court to Orange County Superior Court, State of California. Appearances: Helga Hakimi, Esq. of Berkes Crane Robinson & Seal LLP (213) 955-1150, appearing for Defendant and moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, pursuant to stipulation. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice of Joinder To Defendant Calportland Company's Motion For Change Of Venue from San Francisco Superior Court to Orange County Superior Court, State of California.
